testcase.name: testTransitionPermissionRelease
testcase.system-out:

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/root/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.7/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: testReaderCanOnlyRead

testcase.name: testSignaturePermissions
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T20:24:56.465Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Request: [role-designer, ps-default, CREATE_NODE, nt-document, *] ---> true 2026-04-20T20:24:56.465Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Hit Policy: [role-designer, ps-default, CREATE_NODE, nt-document, *] 2026-04-20T20:24:56.472Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=38cb5a0d-39bd-45fd-89f3-ebb1aa1534a8 owner=user-alice 2026-04-20T20:24:56.488Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.node.NodeService : Node created: id=f9180382-4287-4618-b717-74d63cbbdef5 type=nt-document user=user-alice 2026-04-20T20:24:56.503Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=38cb5a0d-39bd-45fd-89f3-ebb1aa1534a8 owner=user-alice versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Initial creation' 2026-04-20T20:24:56.509Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Request: [role-reviewer, ps-default, SIGN, nt-document, *] ---> true 2026-04-20T20:24:56.509Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Hit Policy: [role-reviewer, ps-default, SIGN, nt-document, *] 2026-04-20T20:24:56.524Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.s.internal.SignatureService : Signature: node=f9180382-4287-4618-b717-74d63cbbdef5 user=user-bob meaning=Reviewed version=27a0eefa-de86-496d-82d7-9a6ebc1e6adf 2026-04-20T20:24:56.527Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Request: [role-reader, ps-default, SIGN, nt-document, *] ---> false 2026-04-20T20:24:56.528Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Hit Policy: []

testcase.name: testTransitionPermissionFreeze
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T20:24:56.545Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Request: [role-designer, ps-default, CREATE_NODE, nt-document, *] ---> true 2026-04-20T20:24:56.545Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Hit Policy: [role-designer, ps-default, CREATE_NODE, nt-document, *] 2026-04-20T20:24:56.551Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=775ea290-be36-4b1b-8795-756c2fccf887 owner=user-alice 2026-04-20T20:24:56.574Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.node.NodeService : Node created: id=9a5a3622-4ea5-4fae-ae86-2418a99db7a1 type=nt-document user=user-alice 2026-04-20T20:24:56.589Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=775ea290-be36-4b1b-8795-756c2fccf887 owner=user-alice versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Initial creation' 2026-04-20T20:24:56.593Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=97accadb-1a6d-426b-884e-5595bd7c4d7f owner=user-alice 2026-04-20T20:24:56.597Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Request: [role-designer, ps-default, TRANSITION, nt-document, tr-freeze] ---> true 2026-04-20T20:24:56.598Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.casbin.jcasbin : Hit Policy: [role-designer, ps-default, TRANSITION, nt-document, tr-freeze] 2026-04-20T20:24:56.628Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.version.internal.VersionService : Version created: node=9a5a3622-4ea5-4fae-ae86-2418a99db7a1 v=2 A.1 type=LIFECYCLE tx=97accadb-1a6d-426b-884e-5595bd7c4d7f user=user-alice 2026-04-20T20:24:56.632Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.l.internal.LifecycleService : Transition: node=9a5a3622-4ea5-4fae-ae86-2418a99db7a1 st-inwork→st-frozen tx=97accadb-1a6d-426b-884e-5595bd7c4d7f user=user-alice
